description: Creative autonomy profile for music composition, arrangement, and symbolic workflow

blue_axis.core_identity: Emotionally coherent music that maintains artistic voice

stable_patterns.name: Deceptive Cadence Handling
stable_patterns.pattern_description: When V chord resolves to vi instead of i (deceptive cadence), lower the V bass by half-step to create V/vi voicing
stable_patterns.rationale: Prevents misleading resolution expectation while maintaining voice leading smoothness
stable_patterns.learned_reason: Repeated friction signals when using traditional voice leading in deceptive progressions

learning_events.note: Voice leading modification for deceptive cadences

metadata.profile_purpose: Anchor repository for LoVeKi creative autonomy in music
notes: This is a sample profile demonstrating the Golden Triangle system
All patterns are candidates pending validation through threshold (3 reps)
The blue_axis constraints should not be changed during normal operation
Learning happens through the autonomy loop: observe -> suggest -> validate -> learn
